author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

CORE Episode 3 Covers and Early Access Out Now!

Are Gyun and Moda ready to bear the weight of the galaxy's future on their shoulders?

Get early access to CORE episode 3 with exclusive covers at our Marketplace and Magic Eden!

Continue to collect the covers to discover the Key of Irs and win incredible prizes!

• Star Atlas Cover - https://play.staratlas.com/market/?category=story
• Magic Eden Cover - https://magiceden.io/launchpad/star_atlas_episode_3
